name: Copper and PEX Pipe Calculator
seo_description: Copper and PEX Pipe Calculator. Total length, Diameter (mm), Supply points — get Length (+10%), Elbows, Tees instantly for your plumbing and water systems.
example_label: Calculate pipe of cobre/PEX to installation of water with 40m of length and 6 points of suministro.

range_hints.longitud: length total of pipe for water fría/caliente

result_context: To {length}m of pipe with {puntos_suministro} points se need {tuberia_m}m of tubo, {accesorios_ud} accesorios and {aislamiento_m}m of insulation thermal.
steps: Estimar accesorios: 6 points × 3 = 18 accesorios (válvulas, codos, tes)
Diferenciar diámetros: 1/2" to grifos, 3/4" to duchas, 1" to principales
mistakes: No aislar tuberías of water caliente (loss of energy)
Use diameter insuficiente (baja pressure in points alejados)
No prever llaves of corte per sector to mantenimiento
description: Copper and PEX Pipe Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
